title: symphyotrichum expansum
intro: Symphyotrichum expansum, also known as the broadleaf ironweed, is a perennial plant native to the United States and Canada. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant has been traditionally used to treat a variety of health issues, including fever, sore throats, and digestive problems, due to its health benefits of reducing inflammation and fighting off infections. Herbal preparations of Symphyotrichum expansum include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be made by steeping the leaves and flowers in hot water or a solvent like ethanol.
